segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you heard about the concert that the University orchestra is putting on in the park? I know you're a big fan of classical music. I am And I'm already going with a group of friends. You should come with us. Thanks. I'd love to. So how much your . tickets have to pay? You sit in the seats up close, near the stage. We're all going to bring blankets and just sit on the grass a little farther back. Good idea. I'll bring a blanket too.
